title: Rudolf Huber
text: Home * People * Rudolf Huber Rudolf Huber [1] Rudolf Huber , a German computer scientist, in the early 90s affiliated with the Technical University of Munich , where he worked with Jürgen Schmidhuber on artificial neural networks . As computer chess programmer, Rudolf Huber is author of the chess program SOS and its parallel version ParSOS which are actually MTD(f) searchers. In 2000, along with Stefan Meyer-Kahlen , Rudolf Huber designed and created the UCI protocol [2] . Artificial Neural Networks .
